indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed obstructs the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: floor-other-merged
indicators.rationale: The floor is obstructed by the bed, preventing any open floor space for yoga.

indicators.name: window-other
indicators.rationale: The window allows natural light to enter, creating a calming atmosphere suitable for yoga.

indicators.name: wall-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden wall provides a warm, natural backdrop for the yoga practice.

indicators.name: shelf
indicators.rationale: The shelf obstructs the open floor space and adds visual clutter.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for yoga due to the presence of the bed and shelf, which obstruct the open floor space. However, the natural light from the window and the wooden wall contribute positively to the atmosphere.
